task_description: Build the complete brand and visual identity system for the Quant Ecosystem in packages/brand/ and docs/brand/. Add missing apps (Maps, Photos), 6-theme system, Indic typography, WCAG contrast utilities, ~100 core icons, app icon set generation, per-app logos, and brand guidelines documentation.

verification.summary: typecheck passes with zero errors, all 31 tests pass, lint clean. Review issues addressed: bharat primary darkened to #C24500 (5.07:1 vs white), maskable icon fill fixed, logo circle text contrast fixed with dark text on light brand colors, primary/primaryForeground AA test added, generateThemeCSS now throws for unknown themes, devanagari JSDoc added.
